articles.author: Lena H. Sun, Lauren Weber
articles.title: White House resisted letting doctor with Ebola return to U.S. - The Washington Post
articles.description: The administration’s reluctance to bring an infected American back to U.S. soil marked a sharp contrast with the 2014 West Africa Ebola outbreak.
articles.content: The White House resisted allowing an American doctor exposed to Ebola while working in the Democratic Republic of Congo to return to the United States, according to five people familiar with the Ebol… [+175 chars]

articles.author: Brenda Goodman, Francesca Giuliani Hoffman
articles.title: American passenger on hantavirus-hit cruise feels ‘blindsided’ and ‘misled’ by new quarantine orders - CNN
articles.description: An American passenger who was exposed to the Andes strain of hantavirus on the cruise ship HV Hondius said he feels “blindsided” and “misled” by new orders that require staying at the National Quarantine Center in Nebraska under federal supervision.
articles.content:
